text:
Edwin Groothuis (Thu 07/09/09 01:36):
> Maintainer of www/p5-Handel,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/136585 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/136585
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Looks good. There is one other change that needs to be made to the
pkg-plist so it doesn't try to remove another port's directory. Patch
attached.

Thank you,
Zach
